root.speaker: Farmer Tess
root.text:
Just out here doing the day's reading. Field-bench is
warmer than the kitchen this time of year.

what.speaker: Farmer Tess
what.text:
Same as ever. The sky, the wind, the way the wheat
leans. Books come later, when the light goes.

day.speaker: Farmer Tess
day.text:
Every morning. You read the field before you work it.
If you don't, you waste a whole day arguing with it.

props.message:
An open workbench in the middle of the wheat. Just a
plank on two stones, but the seat is worn smooth.

props.open_message:
Tucked under the workbench — a Heart Piece. Tess kept
it here through the storm; the gale didn't think to look
at the field-bench.
